TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用3D高斯点渲（3D Gaussian Splatting, 3DGS）的单目RGB图像手内物体重定向方法，显著提升了视觉上的真值转化能力，并在真实机器人上取得了优异表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单目RGB物体姿态估计方法要么需多摄像头、要么需高昂算力，而现实环境下的光照与视觉多样性带来极大挑战，因此急需经济高效、对单摄像头友好的视觉手内物体重定向新方法。

Method: 核心方法是以3DGS对物体进行物理一致的域随机化，将数据增强前置到高斯表现上，合成高逼真、多样化的训练数据；基于这些数据，结合课程式强化学习与师生蒸馏训练感知和控制模型，而且二者可独立在普通硬件上训练。

Result: 实验结果显示，基于3DGS数据训练的姿态估计算法在复杂环境下效果显著优于常规渲染数据，系统在真实多指灵巧手+RGB相机平台上对五类物体的重定向均表现出鲁棒性和稳定性，尤其在困难光照情况下。

Conclusion: 3DGS提供了廉价、不依赖多摄像头的新途径，用于实现高质量RGB单目手内灵巧操作，对于推动机器人感知和控制的实用化应用具有重要意义。

Abstract: In-hand object reorientation requires precise estimation of the object pose to handle complex task dynamics. While RGB sensing offers rich semantic cues for pose tracking, existing solutions rely on multi-camera setups or costly ray tracing. We present a sim-to-real framework for monocular RGB in-hand reorientation that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to bridge the visual sim-to-real gap. Our key insight is performing domain randomization in the Gaussian representation space: by applying physically consistent, pre-rendering augmentations to 3D Gaussians, we generate photorealistic, randomized visual data for object pose estimation. The manipulation policy is trained using curriculum-based reinforcement learning with teacher-student distillation, enabling efficient learning of complex behaviors. Importantly, both perception and control models can be trained independently on consumer-grade hardware, eliminating the need for large compute clusters. Experiments show that the pose estimator trained with 3DGS data outperforms those trained using conventional rendering data in challenging visual environments. We validate the system on a physical multi-fingered hand equipped with an RGB camera, demonstrating robust reorientation of five diverse objects even under challenging lighting conditions. Our results highlight Gaussian splatting as a practical path for RGB-only dexterous manipulation. For videos of the hardware deployments and additional supplementary materials, please refer to the project website: https://rffr.leggedrobotics.com/works/viserdex/

</details>


### [451] [EmbodiedGovBench: A Benchmark for Governance, Recovery, and Upgrade Safety in Embodied Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11174)
*Xue Qin,Simin Luan,John See,Cong Yang,Zhijun Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了EmbodiedGovBench基准，专注于对具身智能系统的治理能力进行系统化评估，补充了传统以任务成功率为主的评估缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前具身AI的评估指标多关注任务完成率或操作精度，忽略了系统是否可治理，即系统的安全、合规、可恢复、可审计及对人类的响应与监督能力。因此亟需一个能全面衡量智能机器人治理表现的评测标准。

Method: 提出了涵盖七个治理维度（未授权能力调用、运行时漂移鲁棒性、恢复成功率、政策可移植性、版本升级安全性、人类干预响应性、审计完整性）的基准体系，包括单机器人和机器人群设置、情景模板、扰动操作、治理指标和基础评测协议。

Result: EmbodiedGovBench能够在模块化接口和合约感知的升级流程下，对不同的具身AI能力运行环境进行治理能力评测，初步验证了基准框架的可行性和必要性。

Conclusion: 治理能力应成为具身AI系统评估的核心目标之一。EmbodiedGovBench为具身AI治理评测提供了首个系统化的测量框架，有助于推动该领域重视治理安全等高阶能力。

Abstract: Recent progress in embodied AI has produced a growing ecosystem of robot policies, foundation models, and modular runtimes. However, current evaluation remains dominated by task success metrics such as completion rate or manipulation accuracy. These metrics leave a critical gap: they do not measure whether embodied systems are governable -- whether they respect capability boundaries, enforce policies, recover safely, maintain audit trails, and respond to human oversight. We present EmbodiedGovBench, a benchmark for governance-oriented evaluation of embodied agent systems. Rather than asking only whether a robot can complete a task, EmbodiedGovBench evaluates whether the system remains controllable, policy-bounded, recoverable, auditable, and evolution-safe under realistic perturbations. The benchmark covers seven governance dimensions: unauthorized capability invocation, runtime drift robustness, recovery success, policy portability, version upgrade safety, human override responsiveness, and audit completeness. We define a benchmark structure spanning single-robot and fleet settings, with scenario templates, perturbation operators, governance metrics, and baseline evaluation protocols. We describe how the benchmark can be instantiated over embodied capability runtimes with modular interfaces and contract-aware upgrade workflows. Our analysis suggests that embodied governance should become a first-class evaluation target. EmbodiedGovBench provides the initial measurement framework for that shift.

</details>


### [452] [CLAW: Composable Language-Annotated Whole-body Motion Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11251)
*Jianuo Cao,Yuxin Chen,Masayoshi Tomizuka*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一套名为CLAW的可扩展语言-动作数据生成平台，用以为人形机器人训练语言条件下的全身控制器，克服了现有数据采集高成本和可行性差的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于现有依赖动捕的数据集代价高昂且动作多样性有限，基于文本生成的运动模型又缺乏物理可行性，因此迫切需要一种高效、可扩展且能生成物理合理动作与描述数据的方式，支撑人形机器人的语言理解与运动学能力提升。

Method: CLAW平台将运动规划器的模式视为可组合的构建块，并设定有移动、朝向、速度、骨盆高度及时长等参数，支持实时键盘操控和时间轴编辑器两种网页界面进行数据采集；用低层全身控制器跟踪仿真中的运动轨迹，保障物理合理性；同时配合模板化生成引擎自动为动作生成多样化自然语言描述。全流程支持批量和探索式标注，数据采样频率为50Hz，并开源发布。

Result: CLAW能够高效生成适用于Unitree G1人形机器人的大规模语言-运动配对数据，动作物理可行并对应多风格自然语言注解，极大降低了数据集采集成本并提升了数据多样性。

Conclusion: 该系统为人形机器人学习提供了实用、高效且可扩展的语言-动作配对数据采集方案，为后续机器人多模态学习和实际部署奠定基础。

Abstract: Training language-conditioned whole-body controllers for humanoid robots requires large-scale datasets pairing motion trajectories with natural-language descriptions.Existing approaches based on motion capture are costly and limited in diversity, while text-to-motion generative models produce purely kinematic outputs that are not guaranteed to be physically feasible.Therefore, we present CLAW, an interactive web-based pipeline for scalable generation of language-annotated whole-body motion data for the Unitree G1 humanoid robot. CLAW treats the motion modes of a kinematic planner as composable building blocks, each parameterized by movement, heading, speed, pelvis height and duration, and provides two browser-based interfaces -- a real-time keyboard mode and a timeline-based sequence editor -- for exploratory and batch data collection. A low-level whole-body controller tracks the planner's kinematic references in MuJoCo simulation, producing physically grounded trajectories recorded at 50Hz. Simultaneously, a deterministic template-based annotation engine generates diverse natural-language descriptions at multiple stylistic registers for every segment and for the full trajectory. We release the system as open source to support scalable generation of language-motion paired data for humanoid robot learning.

</details>


### [453] [Modeling, Analysis and Activation of Planar Viscoelastically-combined Rimless Wheels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11295)
*Fumihiko Asano,Yuxuan Xiang,Yanqiu Zheng,Cong Yan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了通过两个十字形框架和八个粘弹性元件组合而成的新型无动力动态步行器——粘弹性轮缘轮（VCRW），并对其动力学特性和步态进行了数值分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究者希望通过设计新型的无动力步行器，探索更高效、稳定的人造步行机理，并有望为步行辅助装置提供理论基础。

Method: 提出两类VCRW结构（VCRW1和VCRW2），给出其模型假设、运动和碰撞方程，采用数值仿真分析了无动力步行的基本步态特性，并探讨了VCRW2的激活方式以获得更稳定的水平步态。

Result: 数值分析展示了VCRW模型的基本步态特性，并发现对VCRW2进行适当激活可以生成稳定的水平步态。

Conclusion: VCRW作为一种新颖的无动力步行器结构，为步行辅助装置的设计与优化提供了新的思路和理论支持。

Abstract: This paper proposes novel passive-dynamic walkers formed by two cross-shaped frames and eight viscoelastic elements. Since it is a combination of two four-legged rimless wheels via viscoelastic elements, we call it viscoelastically-combined rimless wheel (VCRW). Two types of VCRWs consisting of different cross-shaped frames are introduced; one is formed by combining two Greek-cross-shaped frames (VCRW1), and the other is formed by combining two-link cross-shaped frames that can rotate freely around the central axis (VCRW2). First, we describe the model assumptions and equations of motion and collision. Second, we numerically analyze the basic gait properties of passive dynamic walking. Furthermore, we consider an activation of VCRW2 for generating a stable level gait, and discuss the significance of the study as a novel walking support device.

</details>


### [454] [3D-Anchored Lookahead Planning for Persistent Robotic Scene Memory via World-Model-Based MCTS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11302)
*Bronislav Sidik,Dror Mizrahi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了3D-ALP，一种结合MCTS和3D一致性世界模型的机器人操作推理系统，可应对空间记忆需求并实现顶尖性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的机器人操控系统通常依赖于瞬时图像做出反应，缺乏对被遮挡物体或空间记忆的处理能力，限制了其在复杂任务中的表现。作者希望通过持久的空间锚点与推理能力提升操控系统的智能性与可靠性。

Method: 提出3D-ALP系统，在MCTS树搜索过程中，将3D世界模型作为rollout oracle，并维持相机到世界的锚点，实现即使物体被遮挡后也能准确重新规划。此外，对UCT-MCTS在机器人操控中的四类失效模式进行分析并提出解决办法。

Result: 在需要空间记忆的5步顺序到达任务中，3D-ALP在关键步骤上的成功率远超贪婪反应基线，并通过消融实验确定树搜索的空间记忆为性能提升主因，深度前瞻也提供了附加增益。

Conclusion: 3D-ALP能够显著提升机器人在复杂、需空间记忆任务中的表现，有效解决连续操控中的UCT-MCTS结构性问题，展现了结构化推理系统的巨大潜力。

Abstract: We present 3D-Anchored Lookahead Planning (3D-ALP), a System 2 reasoning engine for robotic manipulation that combines Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) with a 3D-consistent world model as the rollout oracle. Unlike reactive policies that evaluate actions from the current camera frame only, 3D-ALP maintains a persistent camera-to-world (c2w) anchor that survives occlusion, enabling accurate replanning to object positions that are no longer directly observable. On a 5-step sequential reach task requiring spatial memory (Experiment E3), 3D-ALP achieves 0.650 0.109 success rate on memory-required steps versus 0.006 0.008 for a greedy reactive baseline (Δ=+0.645), while step 5 success reaches 0.822 against 0.000 for greedy. An ablation study (30 episodes, 3 seeds) isolates tree search spatial memory as the primary driver (+0.533, 82% of gain) with additional benefit from deeper lookahead (+0.111, 17%). We also identify and resolve four structural failure modes in applying UCT-MCTS (Upper Confidence Bounds applied to Trees [10]) to continuous robotic manipulation.

</details>


### [455] [Learning to Forget -- Hierarchical Episodic Memory for Lifelong Robot Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11306)
*Leonard Bärmann,Joana Plewnia,Alex Waibel,Tamim Asfour*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新框架H^2-EMV，使类人机器人能通过与用户互动学会选择性记忆与遗忘，从而在节省存储和计算资源的同时仍能回答用户查询。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人由于持续感知产生巨量多模态数据，导致存储与实时查询变得不可行，因此需要根据用户的相关性需求进行智能的遗忘机制。

Method: 提出H^2-EMV框架，支持机器人通过用户交互逐步构建分层情节记忆，结合基于语言模型的相关性估计和自然语言规则进行选择性遗忘，并根据用户反馈动态更新规则。

Result: 在模拟家务任务以及ARMAR-7实际录制的20.5小时数据上，H^2-EMV在保证问答准确性的同时，将内存需求降低了45%、查询计算时间缩短35%；用户重复查询时准确率提高70%。

Conclusion: 通过学习遗忘并适应用户偏好，H^2-EMV实现了可扩展、个性化的长期人机协作情节记忆，且效果会随着时间提升。

Abstract: Robots must verbalize their past experiences when users ask "Where did you put my keys?" or "Why did the task fail?" Yet maintaining life-long episodic memory (EM) from continuous multimodal perception quickly exceeds storage limits and makes real-time query impractical, calling for selective forgetting that adapts to users' notions of relevance. We present H$^2$-EMV, a framework enabling humanoids to learn what to remember through user interaction. Our approach incrementally constructs hierarchical EM, selectively forgets using language-model-based relevance estimation conditioned on learned natural-language rules, and updates these rules given user feedback about forgotten details. Evaluations on simulated household tasks and 20.5-hour-long real-world recordings from ARMAR-7 demonstrate that H$^2$-EMV maintains question-answering accuracy while reducing memory size by 45% and query-time compute by 35%. Critically, performance improves over time - accuracy increases 70% in second-round queries by adapting to user-specific priorities - demonstrating that learned forgetting enables scalable, personalized EM for long-term human-robot collaboration.

</details>


### [456] [CLASP: Closed-loop Asynchronous Spatial Perception for Open-vocabulary Desktop Object Grasping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11320)
*Yiran Ling,Wenxuan Li,Siying Dong,Yize Zhang,Xiaoyao Huang,Jing Jiang,Ruonan Li,Jie Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新颖的异步闭环空间感知框架CLASP，实现了机器人对桌面物体的高效抓取，显著提升了鲁棒性与泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在机器人低层次抓取任务上存在优质多模态示范数据稀缺、空间几何感知薄弱导致的空间幻觉，以及在动态环境下开放式控制的脆弱性等问题。

Method: 提出了闭环异步空间感知（CLASP）方法，主要包含三个创新模块：(1) 双通路分层感知模块，将高层语义意图与几何定位解耦，提升空间基础；(2) 异步闭环评估器，利用执行前后的状态异同进行文字化诊断反馈，建立纠错闭环；(3)可扩展多模态数据引擎，结合真实与合成场景自动生成高质量空间标注，无需人工遥操作。

Result: 大量实验表明，所提方法整体抓取成功率达到87.0%，大幅超越现有方法，并在对象多样性、仿真到现实迁移、复杂几何及杂乱场景下表现出优异的泛化性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CLASP为机器人抓取任务提供了更健壮且泛化性强的解决方案，尤其适用于几何复杂和动态杂乱的应用环境。

Abstract: Robot grasping of desktop object is widely used in intelligent manufacturing, logistics, and agriculture.Although vision-language models (VLMs) show strong potential for robotic manipulation, their deployment in low-level grasping faces key challenges: scarce high-quality multimodal demonstrations, spatial hallucination caused by weak geometric grounding, and the fragility of open-loop execution in dynamic environments. To address these challenges, we propose Closed-Loop Asynchronous Spatial Perception(CLASP), a novel asynchronous closed-loop framework that integrates multimodal perception, logical reasoning, and state-reflective feedback. First, we design a Dual-Pathway Hierarchical Perception module that decouples high-level semantic intent from geometric grounding. The design guides the output of the inference model and the definite action tuples, reducing spatial illusions. Second, an Asynchronous Closed-Loop Evaluator is implemented to compare pre- and post-execution states, providing text-based diagnostic feedback to establish a robust error-correction loop and improving the vulnerability of traditional open-loop execution in dynamic environments. Finally, we design a scalable multi-modal data engine that automatically synthesizes high-quality spatial annotations and reasoning templates from real and synthetic scenes without human teleoperation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing baselines, achieving an 87.0% overall success rate. Notably, the proposed framework exhibits remarkable generalization across diverse objects, bridging the sim-to-real gap and providing exceptional robustness in geometrically challenging categories and cluttered scenarios.

</details>


### [457] [Learning Racket-Ball Bounce Dynamics Across Diverse Rubbers for Robotic Table Tennis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11349)
*Thomas Gossard*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个统一的球拍-乒乓球相互作用建模框架，覆盖10种不同胶皮（包括反胶、全防、正胶等），采用高帧速相机和旋转估计，建立大规模碰撞数据集，实现更精准、可泛化的动态模型，并显著提升对非标准胶皮的建模精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有乒乓球机器人碰撞模型大多仅基于线性假设和单一（反胶）球拍，无法应对实际中丰富多样的球拍胶皮类型，从而限制了自动化打球系统的鲁棒性与适应性。研究动机是提升对各类球拍橡胶类型下球-拍动力学过程的准确建模能力。

Method: （1）利用高帧速多摄像机及旋转估计系统，采集包括反胶、全防、正胶等10种典型球拍胶皮下的大规模球-拍碰撞数据，（2）分析在不同入射速度和旋转下，弹性系数及切向冲量等关键物理参数的系统性差异，（3）采用条件高斯过程对基于冲量（impulse-based）的接触动力学模型参数进行自适应建模，依赖旋转与速度输入以动态变化参数。

Result: 所提模型对各类球拍冲击后的速度与旋转预测误差均显著低于常参数基线模型，在全防、正胶等非标准胶皮上提升最大。模型同时能输出不确定性评估，且能够在实战中少量观测下实现拍面动态特性在线辨识。

Conclusion: 该统一建模方法实现了对多种球拍动力学过程的精准预测，增强了乒乓球机器人系统对各种胶皮的适应力，为后续真实环境下灵活可靠的控制策略打下基础。

Abstract: Accurate dynamic models for racket-ball bounces are essential for reliable control in robotic table tennis. Existing models typically assume simple linear models and are restricted to inverted rubbers, limiting their ability to generalize across the wide variety of rackets encountered in practice. In this work, we present a unified framework for modeling ball-racket interactions across 10 racket configurations featuring different rubber types, including inverted, anti-spin, and pimpled surfaces. Using a high-speed multi-camera setup with spin estimation, we collect a dataset of racket-ball bounces spanning a broad range of incident velocities and spins. We show that key physical parameters governing rebound, such as the Coefficient of Restitution and tangential impulse response, vary systematically with the impact state and differ significantly across rubbers. To capture these effects while preserving physical interpretability, we estimate the parameters of an impulse-based contact model using Gaussian Processes conditioned on the ball's incoming velocity and spin. The resulting model provides both accurate predictions and uncertainty estimations. Compared to the constant parameter baselines, our approach reduces post-impact velocity and spin prediction errors across all racket types, with the largest improvements observed for nonstandard rubbers. Furthermore, the GP-based model enables online identification of racket dynamics with few observations during gameplay.

</details>


### [458] [WM-DAgger: Enabling Efficient Data Aggregation for Imitation Learning with World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11351)
*Anlan Yu,Zaishu Chen,Peili Song,Zhiqing Hong,Haotian Wang,Desheng Zhang,Tian He,Yi Ding,Daqing Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种新的模仿学习数据聚合框架WM-DAgger，利用世界模型合成无人工参与的恢复数据，有效解决了累积误差和人力扩展性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然模仿学习能高效训练机器人策略，但小的策略误差会导致机器人进入训练集中未见过的异常状态，从而累积更大错误，最终失败。现有的DAgger框架虽能缓解此问题，但严重依赖于人类持续介入，限制了其大规模应用。

Method: 作者提出WM-DAgger框架，结合世界模型（World Models）在无人工参与情况下合成机器人异常状态下的恢复演示数据。主要创新有两点：(1) 纠正动作合成模块，生成有任务导向的恢复动作，避免误导性监督；(2) 一致性引导过滤模块，通过对比专家演示的真实终止帧，筛除物理上不合理的合成轨迹。研究对象为仅有少量演示的眼在手机器人操作任务。

Result: WM-DAgger方法在多种真实机器人操作任务上进行了验证，在只用5次演示的柔性袋推动实验中取得93.3%的成功率，显著优于传统方法。

Conclusion: WM-DAgger能够在无需人类介入的情况下，高效、可靠地提升机器人模仿学习的效果，为机器人大规模自主学习提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Imitation learning is a powerful paradigm for training robotic policies, yet its performance is limited by compounding errors: minor policy inaccuracies could drive robots into unseen out-of-distribution (OOD) states in the training set, where the policy could generate even bigger errors, leading to eventual failures. While the Data Aggregation (DAgger) framework tries to address this issue, its reliance on continuous human involvement severely limits scalability. In this paper, we propose WM-DAgger, an efficient data aggregation framework that leverages World Models to synthesize OOD recovery data without requiring human involvement. Specifically, we focus on manipulation tasks with an eye-in-hand robotic arm and only few-shot demonstrations. To avoid synthesizing misleading data and overcome the hallucination issues inherent to World Models, our framework introduces two key mechanisms: (1) a Corrective Action Synthesis Module that generates task-oriented recovery actions to prevent misleading supervision, and (2) a Consistency-Guided Filtering Module that discards physically implausible trajectories by anchoring terminal synthesized frames to corresponding real frames in expert demonstrations. We extensively validate WM-DAgger on multiple real-world robotic tasks. Results that our method significantly improves success rates, achieving a 93.3\% success rate in soft bag pushing with only five demonstrations. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/czs12354-xxdbd/WM-Dagger.

</details>


### [459] [MR.ScaleMaster: Scale-Consistent Collaborative Mapping from Crowd-Sourced Monocular Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11372)
*Hyoseok Ju,Giseop Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了 MR.ScaleMaster，一个面向众包单目视频的协同三维地图重建系统，解决了单目协同建图中的尺度崩溃与漂移问题，并支持不同建图模型的无缝集成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单目相机可实现低成本、可扩展的 3D 建图，但易因尺度漂移、尺度歧义和错误回环导致重建失败，尤其是在多机器人和长时序场景。

Method: MR.ScaleMaster包含三大创新机制：（1）尺度崩溃预警，能在错误回环前识别并阻断其影响；（2）Sim(3)锚节点方案，扩展传统SE(3)框架以独立估算每个会话的尺度，实现多机器人尺度一致性；（3）模块化开放接口，无需修改后端即可集成现有任意单目重建算法。

Result: 实验在最多 15 台机器人并行、使用 KITTI 数据集场景下进行，Sim(3)方案的绝对轨迹误差（ATE）比传统SE(3)降幅达7.2倍，预警机制能全部拒绝错误回环且不影响有效约束。还展示了多种算法融合同一地图的能力。

Conclusion: MR.ScaleMaster有效解决了众包单目建图中的关键尺度问题，增强了可靠性与通用性，对实际多机器人三维重建有显著意义。

Abstract: Crowd-sourced cooperative mapping from monocular cameras promises scalable 3D reconstruction without specialized sensors, yet remains hindered by two scale-specific failure modes: abrupt scale collapse from false-positive loop closures in repetitive environments, and gradual scale drift over long trajectories and per-robot scale ambiguity that prevent direct multi-session fusion. We present MR.ScaleMaster, a cooperative mapping system for crowd-sourced monocular videos that addresses both failure modes. MR.ScaleMaster introduces three key mechanisms. First, a Scale Collapse Alarm rejects spurious loop closures before they corrupt the pose graph. Second, a Sim(3) anchor node formulation generalizes the classical SE(3) framework to explicitly estimate per-session scale, resolving per-robot scale ambiguity and enforcing global scale consistency. Third, a modular, open-source, plug-and-play interface enables any monocular reconstruction model to integrate without backend modification. On KITTI sequences with up to 15 agents, the Sim(3) formulation achieves a 7.2x ATE reduction over the SE(3) baseline, and the alarm rejects all false-positive loops while preserving every valid constraint. We further demonstrate heterogeneous multi-robot dense mapping fusing MASt3R-SLAM, pi3, and VGGT-SLAM 2.0 within a single unified map.

</details>


### [460] [Minimal Embodiment Enables Efficient Learning of Number Concepts in Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11373)
*Zhegong Shangguan,Alessandro Di Nuovo,Angelo Cangelosi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种结合机器人身体互动和神经网络模型，用于实现高效的顺序计数学习方法，并证明了相比仅有视觉输入的方法，机器人身体参与显著提升了数感学习的准确率与数据效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解智能系统如何通过传感-动作体验习得抽象的数概念，是认知科学与人工智能领域面临的核心挑战。尤其是在机器人逐渐应用于需理解数量的场景时，如何让其有效地从环境互动中学习数概念亟需解决。

Method: 研究通过建立一个神经网络模型，结合Franka Panda机械臂进行自然化的机器人交互，以实现顺序数数任务的训练和学习。模型通过较少的训练数据进行端到端的计数训练，同时对比了只用视觉输入的基线模型。并在随机化动作和视觉信息配对下测试表示的稳健性，深入分析了模型内部数感表征的生物可解释性。

Result: 结合身体与视觉输入的模型，在仅10%训练数据下可达96.8%的数数准确率，远超视觉-only基线(60.6%)。即使打乱视觉与动作的对应关系后，性能优势依旧保留。模型自发产生了生物可解释的特征：具有对数调谐的数字选择单元、心理数轴、符合韦伯定律的比例扩展、和编码数量级的旋转动力学等，学习过程模拟了儿童数感发展的阶段。

Conclusion: 最小化的身体参与能有效锚定抽象概念、提升数据效率，并产生符合生物认知规律的解释型表征，对未来的数学辅导机器人和工业安全场景具有重要意义。

Abstract: Robots are increasingly entering human-interactive scenarios that require understanding of quantity. How intelligent systems acquire abstract numerical concepts from sensorimotor experience remains a fundamental challenge in cognitive science and artificial intelligence. Here we investigate embodied numerical learning using a neural network model trained to perform sequential counting through naturalistic robotic interaction with a Franka Panda manipulator. We demonstrate that embodied models achieve 96.8\% counting accuracy with only 10\% of training data, compared to 60.6\% for vision-only baselines. This advantage persists when visual-motor correspondences are randomized, indicating that embodiment functions as a structural prior that regularizes learning rather than as an information source. The model spontaneously develops biologically plausible representations: number-selective units with logarithmic tuning, mental number line organization, Weber-law scaling, and rotational dynamics encoding numerical magnitude ($r = 0.97$, slope $= 30.6°$/count). The learning trajectory parallels children's developmental progression from subset-knowers to cardinal-principle knowers. These findings demonstrate that minimal embodiment can ground abstract concepts, improve data efficiency, and yield interpretable representations aligned with biological cognition, which may contribute to embodied mathematics tutoring and safety-critical industrial applications.

</details>


### [461] [ComSim: Building Scalable Real-World Robot Data Generation via Compositional Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11386)
*Yiran Qin,Jiahua Ma,Li Kang,Wenzhan Li,Yihang Jiao,Xin Wen,Xiufeng Song,Heng Zhou,Jiwen Yu,Zhenfei Yin,Xihui Liu,Philip Torr,Yilun Du,Ruimao Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合经典仿真与神经仿真的数据增强新方法，大幅提升机器人在现实环境中的训练效果和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人需要广泛、多样且真实的数据来提升自主任务能力，但高质量数据采集成本高且覆盖有限。为解决训练数据获取难题，提出新数据生成方法。

Method: 提出了Compositional Simulation混合方法，将经典仿真和神经仿真结合，通过闭环的real-sim-real数据增强流水线，只需少量真实数据，即可生成丰富多样并具现实一致性的训练数据。神经模拟器将仿真视频映射为真实世界表现，提升模型训练精度。

Result: 实验显示该方法大幅缩小游戏到真实的域间差距（sim2real gap），在现实环境中训练的机器人策略模型成功率显著提升。

Conclusion: 该方法为仿真与现实场景之间数据生成与迁移提供了可扩展、高效的解决方案，有效促进了机器人自主能力的提升和实用落地。

Abstract: Recent advancements in foundational models, such as large language models and world models, have greatly enhanced the capabilities of robotics, enabling robots to autonomously perform complex tasks. However, acquiring large-scale, high-quality training data for robotics remains a challenge, as it often requires substantial manual effort and is limited in its coverage of diverse real-world environments. To address this, we propose a novel hybrid approach called Compositional Simulation, which combines classical simulation and neural simulation to generate accurate action-video pairs while maintaining real-world consistency. Our approach utilizes a closed-loop real-sim-real data augmentation pipeline, leveraging a small amount of real-world data to generate diverse, large-scale training datasets that cover a broader spectrum of real-world scenarios. We train a neural simulator to transform classical simulation videos into real-world representations, improving the accuracy of policy models trained in real-world environments. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our method significantly reduces the sim2real domain gap, resulting in higher success rates in real-world policy model training. Our approach offers a scalable solution for generating robust training data and bridging the gap between simulated and real-world robotics.

</details>


### [462] [EagleVision: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Cross-Domain Perception in High-Speed Autonomous Racing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11400)
*Zakhar Yagudin,Murad Mebrahtu,Ren Jin,Jiaqi Huang,Yujia Yue,Dzmitry Tsetserukou,Jorge Dias,Majid Khonji*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了EagleVision，一个面向高速自动驾驶赛车的统一多任务基准，专注于3D检测与轨迹预测，填补了以往基准未能涵盖高速极端动态感知挑战的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高速赛车场景的感知极具挑战性，现有的城市场景数据集与基准难以反映这种高动态环境，因此需要专门的数据集和评估标准。

Method: 作者构建了EagleVision基准，整理并标注了Indy Autonomous Challenge和A2RL Real比赛的真实赛车数据，以及1.2万帧模拟数据，并统一评测协议。通过跨多个场景（城市、模拟器、真实赛车）预训练及迁移学习，分析模型的泛化能力。

Result: 实验表明：城市场景预训练可提升赛车检测性能（NDS 0.72优于0.69）；真实赛车中间预训练进一步提升A2RL数据性能（NDS 0.726）；Indy训练下的轨迹预测在A2RL测试上表现超过A2RL自身训练（FDE 0.947优于1.250）。

Conclusion: EagleVision首次为高速极端场景感知泛化提供了系统性研究工具，对3D检测和轨迹预测在高动态环境下的跨领域适应性提供了实证基础。数据集和基准已公开。

Abstract: High-speed autonomous racing presents extreme perception challenges, including large relative velocities and substantial domain shifts from conventional urban-driving datasets. Existing benchmarks do not adequately capture these high-dynamic conditions. We introduce EagleVision, a unified LiDAR-based multi-task benchmark for 3D detection and trajectory prediction in high-speed racing, providing newly annotated 3D bounding boxes for the Indy Autonomous Challenge dataset (14,893 frames) and the A2RL Real competition dataset (1,163 frames), together with 12,000 simulator-generated annotated frames, all standardized under a common evaluation protocol. Using a dataset-centric transfer framework, we quantify cross-domain generalization across urban, simulator, and real racing domains. Urban pretraining improves detection over scratch training (NDS 0.72 vs. 0.69), while intermediate pretraining on real racing data achieves the best transfer to A2RL (NDS 0.726), outperforming simulator-only adaptation. For trajectory prediction, Indy-trained models surpass in-domain A2RL training on A2RL test sequences (FDE 0.947 vs. 1.250), highlighting the role of motion-distribution coverage in cross-domain forecasting. EagleVision enables systematic study of perception generalization under extreme high-speed dynamics. The dataset and benchmark are publicly available at https://avlab.io/EagleVision

</details>


### [463] [Using Unwrapped Full Color Space Palette Recording to Measure Exposedness of a Vehicle Exterior Parts for External Human Machine Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11406)
*Jaerock Kwon,Jose Gonzalez-Belmonte*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文探讨了自动驾驶汽车如何通过外部人机界面（eHMI）向行人传达车辆意图，以减少事故发生。通过三维建模和动画仿真，分析了车辆表面各部位被行人看见的频率，并提出eHMI位置的优化建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶车辆尚不能像人类司机那样与行人互动，尤其是在让行或减速等场景，缺乏有效交流会增加事故风险。现有eHMI设计大多考虑受众正前方视角，忽视了部分被遮挡及多车辆场景。

Method: 本研究利用网格贴图的每个像素唯一着色方式，结合Unity游戏引擎的动画仿真，观测并统计2015款福特F-150 King Ranch车型各表面点在十字路口被行人清晰看到的频率。

Result: 仿真结果表明，保险杠、格栅和引擎盖虽然最常被行人看到，但同车道车辆可能遮挡这些部位，导致这些区域作为eHMI安装位置并不总是有效。

Conclusion: 建议eHMI分布式设置，前风挡和前翼子板同时作为信息显示位置，可以提升行人在不同交通情境下对eHMI的可见性，提高交通安全性。

Abstract: One of the concerns with autonomous vehicles is their ability to communicate their intent to other road users, specially pedestrians, in order to prevent accidents. External Human-Machine Interfaces (eHMIs) are the proposed solution to this issue, through the introduction of electronic devices on the exterior of a vehicle that communicate when the vehicle is planning on slowing down or yielding. This paper uses the technique of unwrapping the faces of a mesh onto a texture where every pixel is a unique color, as well as a series of animated simulations made and ran in the Unity game engine, to measure how many times is each point on a 2015 Ford F-150 King Ranch is unobstructed to a pedestrian attempting to cross the road at a four-way intersection. By cross-referencing the results with a color-coded map of the labeled parts on the exterior of the vehicle, it was concluded that while the bumper, grill, and hood were the parts of the vehicle visible to the crossing pedestrian most often, the existence of other vehicles on the same lane that might obstruct the view of these makes them insufficient. The study recommends instead a distributive approach to eHMIs by using both the windshield and frontal fenders as simultaneous placements for these devices.

</details>


### [464] [Efficient Emotion-Aware Iconic Gesture Prediction for Robot Co-Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11417)
*Edwin C. Montiel-Vazquez,Christian Arzate Cruz,Stefanos Gkikas,Thomas Kassiotis,Giorgos Giannakakis,Randy Gomez*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轻量级Transformer模型，仅基于文本和情感信息，在无需音频输入的情况下，为机器人生成具有语义突出的象似性手势。该方法在BEAT2数据集上超越了GPT-4o，且能实时部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人生成的手势大多数偏向于节奏性运动，缺乏语义层面上的强调，限制了其在实际交流中的自然度与表达力。因此，研究者希望设计一种既能实现语义手势强调、又可实时部署的生成方法。

Method: 作者提出了一种轻量级Transformer模型，该模型在推理阶段仅需文本与情感信息即可推断象似性手势的位置与强度，无需依赖音频输入，从而降低系统复杂度并提升实用性。

Result: 在BEAT2公开数据集上，该模型在手势位置分类和强度回归两个任务上均优于GPT-4o，同时模型参数量小、易于实时运行。

Conclusion: 本文创新性地提出了无需音频输入即可实现语义手势生成的方案，既提升了交流自然度，也满足了实际机器人系统对计算资源和实时性的需求，未来有望推广至更多实际应用场景。

Abstract: Co-speech gestures increase engagement and improve speech understanding. Most data-driven robot systems generate rhythmic beat-like motion, yet few integrate semantic emphasis. To address this, we propose a lightweight transformer that derives iconic gesture placement and intensity from text and emotion alone, requiring no audio input at inference time. The model outperforms GPT-4o in both semantic gesture placement classification and intensity regression on the BEAT2 dataset, while remaining computationally compact and suitable for real-time deployment on embodied agents.

</details>


### [465] [Dyadic Partnership(DP): A Missing Link Towards Full Autonomy in Medical Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11423)
*Nassir Navab,Zhongliang Jiang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了“二元伙伴关系”（Dyadic Partnership，DP）作为医疗机器人朝向高级自主化发展的新范式，主张机器人与临床医生通过智能合作、生成式AI和多模态交互实现更高效决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着医疗机器人智能化的发展，传统遥操作系统受限于由医生完全主导决策，无法实现更高层次的人机协作。为实现更高水平的自主性，需要新的合作范式推动机器人参与智能决策。

Method: 提出并描述了“二元伙伴关系”概念，使机器人与临床医生在生成式AI、多模态意图识别、共同学习、可解释与可信协作等基础上进行动态合作和共同决策。

Result: 文章梳理了实现二元伙伴关系所需的基础组件，如临床智能基础模型、多模态意图识别、共同学习框架、先进可视化以及可解释、可信交互。进一步讨论了实现过程中的关键挑战，包括数据稀缺、标准化不足及伦理接受性。

Conclusion: 二元伙伴关系模式被视为医疗机器人迈向更高自主性、实现更安全直观合作的重要且可行的过渡阶段，为未来临床机器人自动化提供了清晰、渐进的路线图。

Abstract: For the past decades medical robotic solutions were mostly based on the concept of tele-manipulation. While their design was extremely intelligent, allowing for better access, improved dexterity, reduced tremor, and improved imaging, their intelligence was limited. They therefore left cognition and decision making to the surgeon. As medical robotics advances towards high-level autonomy, the scientific community needs to explore the required pathway towards partial and full autonomy. Here, we introduce the concept of Dyadic Partnership(DP), a new paradigm in which robots and clinicians engage in intelligent, expert interaction and collaboration. The Dyadic Partners would discuss and agree on decisions and actions during their dynamic and interactive collaboration relying also on intuitive advanced media using generative AI, such as a world model, and advanced multi-modal visualization. This article outlines the foundational components needed to enable such systems, including foundation models for clinical intelligence, multi-modal intent recognition, co-learning frameworks, advanced visualization, and explainable, trust-aware interaction. We further discuss key challenges such as data scarcity, lack of standardization, and ethical acceptance. Dyadic partnership is introduced and is positioned as a powerful yet achievable, acceptable milestone offering a promising pathway toward safer, more intuitive collaboration and a gradual transition to full autonomy across diverse clinical settings.

</details>


### [466] [Safe Human-to-Humanoid Motion Imitation Using Control Barrier Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11447)
*Wenqi Cai,John Abanes,Nikolaos Evangeliou,Anthony Tzes*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个基于视觉的人形机器人运动模仿安全框架，实现机器人的安全模仿与避碰。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人机互动或机器人模仿人类运动的场景中，安全性（避免机器人自碰撞和与人碰撞）是非常关键的问题。

Method: 利用单摄像头捕捉人骨骼关键点，通过算法转换为机器人关节角度，实现运动重定向。通过控制屏障函数（CBF）和二次规划（QP）来过滤模仿指令，确保安全。

Result: 仿真实验验证了该框架能够实时进行考虑碰撞的安全运动模仿，有效避免碰撞。

Conclusion: 该方法能够在保障安全的前提下，实现人形机器人对人类动作的高效、实时模仿。

Abstract: Ensuring operational safety is critical for human-to-humanoid motion imitation. This paper presents a vision-based framework that enables a humanoid robot to imitate human movements while avoiding collisions. Human skeletal keypoints are captured by a single camera and converted into joint angles for motion retargeting. Safety is enforced through a Control Barrier Function (CBF) layer formulated as a Quadratic Program (QP), which filters imitation commands to prevent both self-collisions and human-robot collisions. Simulation results validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework for real-time collision-aware motion imitation.

</details>


### [467] [DA-PTQ: Drift-Aware Post-Training Quantization for Efficient Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11572)
*Siyuan Xu,Tianshi Wang,Fengling Li,Lei Zhu,Heng Tao Shen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Drift-Aware Post-Training Quantization (DA-PTQ)的新颖量化方法，能够显著降低低比特量化下视觉-语言-行动模型(VLA)的性能损失，支持高效部署于资源有限的机器人。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA模型高内存和计算需求限制了其在资源有限机器人的实际部署。传统后训练量化(PTQ)会导致时序控制下漂移加重，显著影响运动轨迹的准确性。因此需要一种减少量化误差积累、提升低精度模型运动控制表现的新方案。

Method: 方法包括：(1)跨空间表征补偿，缓解模态间表征与动作空间的结构化失真，提升动作一致性；(2)基于运动的混合精度分配，通过最小化轨迹级别的运动误差自适应分配各层比特宽度。整体作为一个漂移感知优化问题进行建模。

Result: 实验表明DA-PTQ能大幅降低动力学漂移，在低位量化（低精度）下维持接近全精度模型的性能，实现多模态VLA模型在小型机器人平台上的可实际部署。

Conclusion: DA-PTQ有效解决了传统PTQ在多模态时序决策中引发的漂移问题，可提升低精度VLA模型的运动控制稳定性，为VLA模型实际应用拓展了硬件边界。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) have demonstrated strong potential for embodied AI, yet their deployment on resource-limited robots remains challenging due to high memory and computational demands. While Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) provides an efficient solution, directly applying PTQ to VLAs often results in severe performance degradation during sequential control. We identify temporal error accumulation as a key factor, where quantization perturbations at the vision-language-to-action interface are progressively amplified, leading to kinematic drift in executed trajectories. To address this issue, we propose Drift-Aware Post-Training Quantization (DA-PTQ), which formulates quantization as a drift-aware optimization problem over sequential decision processes. DA-PTQ consists of two components: (1) Cross-Space Representation Compensation, which mitigates structured distortions between multimodal representations and action space to improve action consistency, and (2) Motion-Driven Mixed-Precision Allocation, which assigns bit-widths by minimizing trajectory-level motion errors. Extensive experiments show that DA-PTQ significantly reduces kinematic drift and achieves comparable performance to full-precision models under low-bit settings, enabling practical deployment of VLAs on resource-limited robotic platforms.

</details>


### [468] [Optimal Kinodynamic Motion Planning Through Anytime Bidirectional Heuristic Search with Tight Termination Condition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11587)
*Yi Wang,Bingxian Mu,Shahab Shokouhi,May-Win Thein*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型的双向收敛、具备快速启发式搜索与易评估终止条件的运动规划算法：BTIT*。该方法提升了首次解速度与收敛性，适用于动力学约束场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前采样式运动规划存在“首次解速度慢”和“收敛性不足”的瓶颈，尤其是在高维动力学系统中。因此，急需一种快捷、可在线早停并保持最优性的算法，来优化规划效率和质量。

Method: 提出的BTIT*结合了双向启发式搜索（anytime bidirectional heuristic search），确保“中点相遇”属性和最优性。其创新之处是引入了可高效评估、支持批量在线早停的终止条件，有助于算法随时输出暂时最优解。

Result: 在两个动力学基准测试（4D二阶积分器和10D四旋翼模型）上，BTIT*比现有非惰性信息批量规划方法更快获得首次解，且收敛性提升明显。

Conclusion: BTIT*作为首个具备此类终止条件的MEET风格算法，实现了动力学运动规划领域首次解速度与收敛性的综合提升，具有实际应用前景并已开源。

Abstract: This paper introduces Bidirectional Tight Informed Trees (BTIT*), an asymptotically optimal kinodynamic sampling-based motion planning algorithm that integrates an anytime bidirectional heuristic search (Bi-HS) and ensures the \emph{meet-in-the-middle} property (MMP) and optimality (MM-optimality). BTIT* is the first anytime MEET-style algorithm to utilize termination conditions that are efficient to evaluate and enable early termination \emph{on-the-fly} in batch-wise sampling-based motion planning. Experiments show that BTIT* achieves strongly faster time-to-first-solution and improved convergence than representative \emph{non-lazy} informed batch planners on two kinodynamic benchmarks: a 4D double-integrator model and a 10D linearized Quadrotor. The source code is available here.

</details>


### [469] [Micro-Dexterity in Biological Micromanipulation: Embodiment, Perception, and Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11640)
*Kangyi Lu,Lan Wei,Zongcai Tan,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文综述了微尺度操控在生物微观对象精确与自适应交互方面的发展，提出“微灵巧”作为分析框架，系统梳理三类主要微操作平台，探讨它们在真实生物医用环境下的挑战与未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管微观操控技术在实验室已有较大发展，但在真实生物医学场景中，面对软、易碎且异质的微观目标时，现有方法在精确灵巧操作上仍有较大差距，因此为改善现有微操作系统适应性、准确性和实用性，需要重新定义并分析微观尺度下的操控原理与方法。

Method: 本文回顾和比较了三类主要微操作平台：（1）有实体的微型机器人，（2）场驱动的非接触系统，（3）外部驱动的末端执行工具，并以“微灵巧”为分析框架，从体现、感知和控制三方面重新考察微尺度下的推、翻转、抓取等基本操控动作，对现有的操控架构、感知与控制策略进行了详细梳理与对比。

Result: 系统总结了不同平台在各种基本操控任务中的优势与局限，指出目前在真实临床微操作任务与实验室技术之间仍存在显著“灵巧差距”。

Conclusion: 未来应致力于缩小实验室与真实生物应用之间的灵巧差距，重点突破微操作的精确感知、柔顺控制以及与软、异质目标的适应性等关键技术挑战，从而推动微操控技术的临床转化应用。

Abstract: Microscale manipulation has advanced substantially in controlled locomotion and targeted transport, yet many biomedical applications require precise and adaptive interaction with biological micro-objects. At these scales, manipulation is realized through three main classes of platforms: embodied microrobots that physically interact as mobile agents, field-mediated systems that generate contactless trapping or manipulation forces, and externally actuated end-effectors that interact through remotely driven physical tools. Unlike macroscale manipulators, these systems function in fluidic, confined, and surface-dominated environments characterized by negligible inertia, dominant interfacial forces, and soft, heterogeneous, and fragile targets. Consequently, classical assumptions of dexterous manipulation, including rigid-body contact, stable grasping, and rich proprioceptive feedback, become difficult to maintain. This review introduces micro-dexterity as a framework for analyzing biological micromanipulation through the coupled roles of embodiment, perception, and control. We examine how classical manipulation primitives, including pushing, reorientation, grasping, and cooperative manipulation, are reformulated at the microscale; compare the architectures that enable them, from contact-based micromanipulators to contactless field-mediated systems and cooperative multi-agent platforms; and review the perception and control strategies required for task execution. We identify the current dexterity gap between laboratory demonstrations and clinically relevant biological manipulation, and outline key challenges for future translation.

</details>


### [470] [AffordSim: A Scalable Data Generator and Benchmark for Affordance-Aware Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11674)
*Mingyang Li,Haofan Xu,Haowen Sun,Xinzhe Chen,Sihua Ren,Liqi Huang,Xinyang Sui,Chenyang Miao,Qiongjie Cui,Zeyang Liu,Xingyu Chen,Xuguang Lan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了AffordSim模拟平台，首次将3D可供性（affordance）预测整合到机械臂操作数据生成流程中，并验证其在复杂任务上的应用效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的机器人操作模拟训练平台难以自动生成对功能区域有精确语义的操作轨迹，如抓取杯把、倾倒等，需要引入可供性信息以提升高难度任务的数据生成能力。

Method: 提出AffordSim框架，将自主研发的VoxAfford模型（支持开放词汇的3D可供性检测器）嵌入到NVIDIA Isaac Sim中，结合基于MLLM的任务生成、多尺度几何特征、跨机械臂支持以及照片域随机化，实现了基于可供性的大规模、自动化操作数据生成。

Result: 建立了7类共50项任务基准，并在4种模仿学习算法上进行评测。结果表明，抓取任务取得53%-93%的高成功率，但复杂可供性任务（如精确倒入、挂杯）成功率较低（1%-47%），反映出现有方法在可供性指导下仍有较大提升空间。同时，实现了零样本仿真到现实的迁移验证。

Conclusion: AffordSim为复杂、高语义需求的操作任务带来了更实用的数据生成方法，揭示了可供性信息对提升机器人操作学习的重要性，也指出当前模仿学习方法在更复杂的可供性场景下尚待突破。

Abstract: Simulation-based data generation has become a dominant paradigm for training robotic manipulation policies, yet existing platforms do not incorporate object affordance information into trajectory generation. As a result, tasks requiring precise interaction with specific functional regions--grasping a mug by its handle, pouring from a cup's rim, or hanging a mug on a hook--cannot be automatically generated with semantically correct trajectories. We introduce AffordSim, the first simulation framework that integrates open-vocabulary 3D affordance prediction into the manipulation data generation pipeline. AffordSim uses our VoxAfford model, an open-vocabulary 3D affordance detector that enhances MLLM output tokens with multi-scale geometric features, to predict affordance maps on object point clouds, guiding grasp pose estimation toward task-relevant functional regions. Built on NVIDIA Isaac Sim with cross-embodiment support (Franka FR3, Panda, UR5e, Kinova), VLM-powered task generation, and novel domain randomization using DA3-based 3D Gaussian reconstruction from real photographs, AffordSim enables automated, scalable generation of affordance-aware manipulation data. We establish a benchmark of 50 tasks across 7 categories (grasping, placing, stacking, pushing/pulling, pouring, mug hanging, long-horizon composite) and evaluate 4 imitation learning baselines (BC, Diffusion Policy, ACT, Pi 0.5). Our results reveal that while grasping is largely solved (53-93% success), affordance-demanding tasks such as pouring into narrow containers (1-43%) and mug hanging (0-47%) remain significantly more challenging for current imitation learning methods, highlighting the need for affordance-aware data generation. Zero-shot sim-to-real experiments on a real Franka FR3 validate the transferability of the generated data.

</details>


### [471] [Dual-Control Frequency-Aware Diffusion Model for Depth-Dependent Optical Microrobot Microscopy Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11680)
*Lan Wei,Zongcai Tan,Kangyi Lu,Jian-Qing Zheng,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文提出了Du-FreqNet，一种双重控制、频率感知的扩散模型，用于高保真度的医学显微图像生成，提升了微观机器人感知与任务表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微型光学机器人需要精确的三维感知以实现自主操作，但高质量显微图像数据集稀缺，且GAN等生成模型难以复现深度相关的衍射和散焦等物理特性。为解决这一关键难题，作者开发新型生成模型以提升显微图像的物理一致性和数据扩增能力。

Method: 提出Du-FreqNet，其核心是双路ControlNet结构，分别对微观机器人的三维点云和深度相关的网格层进行编码。引入自适应频域损失函数，结合可微分的FFT监督，动态调整高低频分量以反映焦平面距离，从而提升合成图像的物理特征表现。模型使用有限图像数据（每个姿态仅需80张）进行训练。

Result: 实验显示，Du-FreqNet能实现可控、深度相关的显微图像合成，相较常规基线，结构相似性（SSIM）提升20.7%。模型在未见过的新姿态上也能良好泛化，有效促进下游三维姿态与深度估计等任务。

Conclusion: Du-FreqNet为微型机器人提供了高质量的深度感知数据增强方法，极大提升了显微图像的物理一致性，支持更鲁棒的闭环微型机器人控制。

Abstract: Optical microrobots actuated by optical tweezers (OT) are important for cell manipulation and microscale assembly, but their autonomous operation depends on accurate 3D perception. Developing such perception systems is challenging because large-scale, high-quality microscopy datasets are scarce, owing to complex fabrication processes and labor-intensive annotation. Although generative AI offers a promising route for data augmentation, existing generative adversarial network (GAN)-based methods struggle to reproduce key optical characteristics, particularly depth-dependent diffraction and defocus effects. To address this limitation, we propose Du-FreqNet, a dual-control, frequency-aware diffusion model for physically consistent microscopy image synthesis. The framework features two independent ControlNet branches to encode microrobot 3D point clouds and depth-specific mesh layers, respectively. We introduce an adaptive frequency-domain loss that dynamically reweights high- and low-frequency components based on the distance to the focal plane. By leveraging differentiable FFT-based supervision, Du-FreqNet captures physically meaningful frequency distributions often missed by pixel-space methods. Trained on a limited dataset (e.g., 80 images per pose), our model achieves controllable, depth-dependent image synthesis, improving SSIM by 20.7% over baselines. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Du-FreqNet generalizes effectively to unseen poses and significantly enhances downstream tasks, including 3D pose and depth estimation, thereby facilitating robust closed-loop control in microrobotic systems.

</details>


### [472] [ACT: Automated CPS Testing for Open-Source Robotic Platforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11708)
*Aditya A. Krishnan,Donghoon Kim,Hokeun Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自动化的网络物理系统（CPS）测试方法（ACT），能在真实机器人平台上自动持续测试开源软件，解决以往测试不足导致的关键错误难以发现的问题。通过集成至如GitHub的开源基础设施，实现在实际开源CPS和教育机器人平台上的案例研究，展示了ACT的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前CPS开源软件缺乏在机器人平台上的系统性、持续性测试，尤其在多模块、多贡献者协作中，更容易遗漏关键错误。现有测试无法及时发现实际运行中的问题，影响系统可靠性。作者为弥补此缺口，提出了新型自动化测试机制。

Method: 作者提出并实现了自动化CPS测试（ACT），它可与主流开源平台如GitHub集成，实现对开源CPS软件在实际机器人平台上的自动、持续测试。其通过原型系统和具体案例研究，实地验证了所提方案。

Result: 通过在实际开源CPS和教育机器人平台上的案例研究，证明ACT能够有效识别并解决软件中的关键错误，提高了测试的自动化和持续性。

Conclusion: ACT方法增强了CPS开源软件的测试环节，有助于及时发现和修复关键错误，从而提升多贡献者协作环境下CPS软件的可靠性与质量。

Abstract: Open-source software for cyber-physical systems (CPS) often lacks robust testing involving robotic platforms, resulting in critical errors that remain undetected. This is especially challenging when multiple modules of CPS software are developed by various open-source contributors. To address this gap, we propose Automated CPS Testing (ACT) that performs automated, continuous testing of open-source software with its robotic platforms, integrated with the open-source infrastructure such as GitHub. We implement an ACT prototype and conduct a case study on an open-source CPS with an educational robotic platform to demonstrate its capabilities.

</details>


### [473] [Multi-ORFT: Stable Online Reinforcement Fine-Tuning for Multi-Agent Diffusion Planning in Cooperative Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11734)
*Haojie Bai,Aimin Li,Ruoyu Yao,Xiongwei Zhao,Tingting Zhang,Xing Zhang,Lin Gao,and Jun Ma*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Multi-ORFT方法，通过场景一致扩散预训练与稳定的在线强化后训练相结合，提高了多智能体闭环协同驾驶的安全性和交通效率。该方法在WOMD基准上性能优越，超越了多项开源方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的扩散式轨迹规划器虽然可以从演示中建模多模态行为，但在场景一致性、闭环目标对齐和在线强化训练稳定性方面存在不足，限制了多智能体协作驾驶的可靠性。因此，亟需兼顾场景理解、多模态行为和强化学习稳定性的改进方法。

Method: 1）离线预训练时，结合了智能体间自注意力、交叉注意力和AdaLN-Zero场景条件机制，提升多智能体轨迹的场景一致性和道路遵循性；2）在线后训练阶段，构建了两级MDP，并通过暴露逆核似然优化、引入密集轨迹奖励与方差门控的组相对策略优化（VG-GRPO），保障训练稳定性和性能提升。

Result: 在WOMD闭环基准上，与单独预训练规划器相比，Multi-ORFT将碰撞率从2.04%降至1.89%、偏离道路率从1.68%降至1.36%，平均速度从8.36 m/s提升至8.61 m/s。在主要的安全和效率指标上超越了包括SMART-large、SMART-tiny-CLSFT和VBD等强有力的开源方法。

Conclusion: 提出的Multi-ORFT方法，通过场景一致扩散预训练与稳定的在线优化策略有效结合，显著提升了闭环协同驾驶的可靠性、安全性及效率，对多智能体交通系统的实用化具有重要推动作用。

Abstract: Closed-loop cooperative driving requires planners that generate realistic multimodal multi-agent trajectories while improving safety and traffic efficiency. Existing diffusion planners can model multimodal behaviors from demonstrations, but they often exhibit weak scene consistency and remain poorly aligned with closed-loop objectives; meanwhile, stable online post-training in reactive multi-agent environments remains difficult. We present Multi-ORFT, which couples scene-conditioned diffusion pre-training with stable online reinforcement post-training. In pre-training, the planner uses inter-agent self-attention, cross-attention, and AdaLN-Zero-based scene conditioning to improve scene consistency and road adherence of joint trajectories. In post-training, we formulate a two-level MDP that exposes step-wise reverse-kernel likelihoods for online optimization, and combine dense trajectory-level rewards with variance-gated group-relative policy optimization (VG-GRPO) to stabilize training. On the WOMD closed-loop benchmark, Multi-ORFT reduces collision rate from 2.04% to 1.89% and off-road rate from 1.68% to 1.36%, while increasing average speed from 8.36 to 8.61 m/s relative to the pre-trained planner, and it outperforms strong open-source baselines including SMART-large, SMART-tiny-CLSFT, and VBD on the primary safety and efficiency metrics. These results show that coupling scene-consistent denoising with stable online diffusion-policy optimization improves the reliability of closed-loop cooperative driving.

</details>


### [474] [Grounded World Model for Semantically Generalizable Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11751)
*Quanyi Li,Lan Feng,Haonan Zhang,Wuyang Li,Letian Wang,Alexandre Alahi,Harold Soh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合视觉-语言对齐（VLA）潜在空间的世界模型，用于提升基于视觉的模型预测控制（MPC）在理解和执行自然语言任务指令上的能力，并在新基准测试WISER上显著超越传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉运动MPC往往通过比较预测图像与目标图像的距离来指导选择动作，但实际操作中提前获得目标图像较难，且图像表述交互性有限，自然语言表达任务目标更为灵活丰富。

Method: 作者提出在视觉-语言对齐的潜在空间中训练世界模型（GWM），用嵌入相似性衡量动作结果与任务语言指令（而非单一目标图像）的契合度，从而将MPC转化为VLA（视觉-语言代理），提高对语义的泛化能力。

Result: 在作者提出的WISER基准（288个未见视觉信号与任务表达）上，GWM-MPC在测试集上达到了87%的成功率，显著优于传统VLA平均22%的成功率，传统方法虽对训练集过拟合（90%成功率），但泛化能力差。

Conclusion: 基于视觉-语言对齐空间的世界模型能更好地理解和执行自然语言描述的任务指令，显著提升MPC系统在变化环境和灵活任务描述下的泛化与鲁棒性。

Abstract: In Model Predictive Control (MPC), world models predict the future outcomes of various action proposals, which are then scored to guide the selection of the optimal action. For visuomotor MPC, the score function is a distance metric between a predicted image and a goal image, measured in the latent space of a pretrained vision encoder like DINO and JEPA. However, it is challenging to obtain the goal image in advance of the task execution, particularly in new environments. Additionally, conveying the goal through an image offers limited interactivity compared with natural language. In this work, we propose to learn a Grounded World Model (GWM) in a vision-language-aligned latent space. As a result, each proposed action is scored based on how close its future outcome is to the task instruction, reflected by the similarity of embeddings. This approach transforms the visuomotor MPC to a VLA that surpasses VLM-based VLAs in semantic generalization. On the proposed WISER benchmark, GWM-MPC achieves a 87% success rate on the test set comprising 288 tasks that feature unseen visual signals and referring expressions, yet remain solvable with motions demonstrated during training. In contrast, traditional VLAs achieve an average success rate of 22%, even though they overfit the training set with a 90% success rate.

</details>


### [475] [StarVLA-$α$: Reducing Complexity in Vision-Language-Action Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11757)
*Jinhui Ye,Ning Gao,Senqiao Yang,Jinliang Zheng,Zixuan Wang,Yuxin Chen,Pengguang Chen,Yilun Chen,Shu Liu,Jiaya Jia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了StarVLA-α，一个简单但强大的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型基线，用于系统化研究VLA设计选择，并且在统一多任务基准下表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在架构、训练数据、机器人形态和评测工程等方面高度分裂复杂，缺乏统一、系统性的基线，阻碍了方法对比与分析。

Method: StarVLA-α通过最大程度简化模型结构与训练流程，移除非必要的复杂性，在多基准测试环境下（如LIBERO、SimplerEnv、RoboTwin、RoboCasa）对VLA设计关键因素（如动作建模、预训练、接口设计等）进行重新评估。

Result: StarVLA-α作为一个通用模型，在所有受测基准中均具高度竞争力，特别是在真实世界RoboChallenge公开基准上，超越π_{0.5}模型20%。

Conclusion: 本工作验证了配备强大视觉-语言主干和最小设计的模型即可取得高性能，无需复杂工程技巧。StarVLA-α为后续VLA领域研究提供了坚实出发点。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for building general-purpose robotic agents. However, the VLA landscape remains highly fragmented and complex: as existing approaches vary substantially in architectures, training data, embodiment configurations, and benchmark-specific engineering. In this work, we introduce StarVLA-$α$, a simple yet strong baseline designed to study VLA design choices under controlled conditions. StarVLA-$α$ deliberately minimizes architectural and pipeline complexity to reduce experimental confounders and enable systematic analysis. Specifically, we re-evaluate several key design axes, including action modeling strategies, robot-specific pretraining, and interface engineering. Across unified multi-benchmark training on LIBERO, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin, and RoboCasa, the same simple baseline remains highly competitive, indicating that a strong VLM backbone combined with minimal design is already sufficient to achieve strong performance without relying on additional architectural complexity or engineering tricks. Notably, our single generalist model outperforms $π_{0.5}$ by 20\% on the public real-world RoboChallenge benchmark. We expect StarVLA-$α$ to serve as a solid starting point for future research in the VLA regime. Code will be released at https://github.com/starVLA/starVLA.

</details>


### [476] [Identifying Inductive Biases for Robot Co-Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11768)
*Apoorv Vaish,Oliver Brock*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效的机器人形态与控制协同设计（co-design）算法，比现有基线算法提升了36%的性能，并在采样效率上提高了两个数量级。该方法通过分析协同设计空间结构，利用归纳偏置提升了搜索效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人设计中，形态和控制协同进化可以模仿生物体，实现更优性能。然而，协同设计属于高维搜索问题，难以求解。现有方法未能有效利用搜索空间中的结构化信息（归纳偏置），导致搜索低效。

Method: 作者分析了适用于软体机器人运动与操作任务的协同设计空间，发现高质量设计集中在低维流形，并且更优设计常见于形态与控制紧密耦合的区域。基于这些发现，提出一种能自适应推断并利用协同设计空间结构的协同设计算法。该算法在搜索过程中不断学习和适应不同任务的结构特征，以提升设计效率和性能。

Result: 新算法相较于基线算法，在性能提升了36%，且采样效率提高了两个数量级。

Conclusion: 系统分析并利用协同设计空间中稳定的结构化模式，有助于设计高效且具适应性的机器人协同设计方法。挖掘归纳偏置能显著提升协同设计的效果和效率。

Abstract: Co-designing a robot's morphology and control can ensure synergistic interactions between them, prevalent in biological organisms. However, co-design is a high-dimensional search problem. To make this search tractable, we need a systematic method for identifying inductive biases tailored to its structure. In this paper, we analyze co-design landscapes for soft locomotion and manipulation tasks and identify three patterns that are consistent across regions of their co-design spaces. We observe that within regions of co-design space, quality varies along a low-dimensional manifold. Higher-quality regions exhibit variations spread across more dimensions, while tightly coupling morphology and control. We leverage these insights to devise an efficient co-design algorithm. Since the precise instantiation of this structure varies across tasks and is not known a priori, our algorithm infers it from information gathered during search and adapts to each task's specific structure. This yields $36\%$ more improvement than benchmark algorithms. Moreover, our algorithm achieved more than two orders of magnitude in sample efficiency compared to these benchmark algorithms, demonstrating the effectiveness of leveraging inductive biases to co-design.

</details>


### [477] [Disentangled Point Diffusion for Precise Object Placement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11793)
*Lyuxing He,Eric Cai,Shobhit Aggarwal,Jianjun Wang,David Held*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出TAX-DPD，一种分层、可解耦的点云扩散方法，用于目标物体高精度摆放，实现了在多模态覆盖和新物体泛化上的领先性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 端到端策略虽灵活但泛化与精度有限，物体中心方法虽模块化但仍待提升，急需能兼具精度、泛化和适应不同场景的算法。

Method: 提出TAX-DPD框架：首先用稠密高斯混合模型（GMM）生成全局场景级摆放初始分布，再用解耦的点云扩散模块分别处理物体几何与摆放姿态，实现局部精细推理。

Result: 在多组仿真与现实高精度工业插入等任务中，TAX-DPD超越了SE(3)扩散等方法，并在柔性物体布挂仿真任务中展示了更广的适应性。

Conclusion: TAX-DPD兼具高度精度、优秀的泛化能力与多模态表达，适用于不同物体和场景下的高精度操作，未来可扩展到更多非刚体任务。

Abstract: Recent advances in robotic manipulation have highlighted the effectiveness of learning from demonstration. However, while end-to-end policies excel in expressivity and flexibility, they struggle both in generalizing to novel object geometries and in attaining a high degree of precision. An alternative, object-centric approach frames the task as predicting the placement pose of the target object, providing a modular decomposition of the problem. Building on this goal-prediction paradigm, we propose TAX-DPD, a hierarchical, disentangled point diffusion framework that achieves state-of-the-art performance in placement precision, multi-modal coverage, and generalization to variations in object geometries and scene configurations. We model global scene-level placements through a novel feed-forward Dense Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) that yields a spatially dense prior over global placements; we then model the local object-level configuration through a novel disentangled point cloud diffusion module that separately diffuses the object geometry and the placement frame, enabling precise local geometric reasoning. Interestingly, we demonstrate that our point cloud diffusion achieves substantially higher accuracy than a prior approach based on SE(3)-diffusion, even in the context of rigid object placement. We validate our approach across a suite of challenging tasks in simulation and in the real-world on high-precision industrial insertion tasks. Furthermore, we present results on a cloth-hanging task in simulation, indicating that our framework can further relax assumptions on object rigidity.

</details>
